description_long: This is a robust adult male figure with a muscular build, dressed in rustic attire suitable for outdoor or urban environments. He wears a wide-brimmed hat and a sleeveless vest over a shirt, with arm bracers and sturdy pants tucked into high boots. His most distinctive feature is a long, intricately braided beard that extends down to his waist, giving him a unique and memorable appearance. The clothing is accented with layered textures and accessories, such as shoulder straps and knee guards, suggesting a practical, utilitarian style. The skin is exposed on the arms, showing defined musculature, while the face is stern and expressive. The overall look is that of a strong, capable pedestrian, possibly inspired by fantasy or historical themes.
description: A muscular adult male pedestrian with a wide-brimmed hat, long braided beard, sleeveless vest, arm bracers, and high boots, exuding a rugged, practical style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, wide-brimmed hat, long braided beard, sleeveless vest, and detailed front of the outfit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hat, beard's length, muscular arm, and side details of the vest and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hat, vest, exposed arms, and the back of the pants and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the beard's profile, arm bracer, and side of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: wide-brimmed hat, sleeveless vest over shirt, arm bracers, sturdy pants, high boots
attribute_hairstyle: very long, intricately braided beard and mustache
